title: The Story of the Poet Abu Shas
description: The poet Abu Shas, whose full name was al-Ghitrif b. Husayn b. Hanash, was a youth of Iraqi origin but raised in Khurisan, well educated and knowledgeable. 448 Sarkhistin had attached Abu Shas to himself to learn from him the characteristics and ways of thought of the Arabs. When Sarkhistin suffered his fate Abu Shas was in his military camp, together with riding beasts and baggage. A group of the Bukhariyyah449 from al-Hasan's troops suddenly fell upon him, seizing as plunder everything that he had with him, and several wounds were inflicted on him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 33
